content: better-auth has an official TanStack Start integration. Mount auth handler at /api/auth/$.ts, use tanstackStartCookies plugin for cookie handling. Supports 40+ built-in providers. Generic OAuth plugin supports any OAuth 2.0 provider (configure with providerId, clientId, clientSecret, authorizationUrl, tokenUrl, scopes) — can configure Battle.net this way. Session-based auth with database adapter. Can integrate with Drizzle ORM.
